name: INTERPACE BIOSCIENCES, INC.
business: Interpace Biosciences provides esoteric molecular diagnostic testing and pathology services to aid physicians in evaluating cancer risk, currently focusing on its thyroid cancer tests ThyGeNEXT and ThyraMIR v2. The company's clinical services customers consist primarily of physicians, hospitals, cancer centers, commercial laboratories, pathology groups, and clinics.

exposures.sentence: We develop and commercialize genomic tests that can personalize medicine to help improve patient diagnosis and management.

catalysts.event: Board approved restructuring plan due to loss of PancraGEN coverage
catalysts.sentence: On January 14, 2025, the Board of Directors approved a Restructuring Plan and cost-savings to reduce and better align its workforce with the anticipated loss of PancraGEN coverage by CMS.

catalysts.event: CMS LCD L39365 took effect, ending PancraGEN reimbursement
catalysts.sentence: On April 24, 2025, the Company announced that the LCD would take effect immediately.

catalysts.event: Last date to accept specimens for PancraGEN testing
catalysts.sentence: Specimens for first-line fluid chemistry and PancraGEN testing were not accepted by the Company after May 2, 2025.

catalysts.event: Company common stock removed from OTCQX
catalysts.sentence: The Company's common stock was removed from quotation on the OTCQX on August 18, 2025.

catalysts.event: Term Loan with BroadOak paid in full
catalysts.sentence: The balance of the Term Loan was paid in full in November 2025.

tamClaims.claim: The global esoteric molecular diagnostics market was valued at $29.6 billion in 2025, projected to grow to $32.6 billion in 2026 and $75.9 billion by 2034, CAGR 11.12%.
tamClaims.sentence: The global esoteric molecular diagnostics market, valued at $29.6 billion (USD) in 2025, is projected to grow to $32.6 billion (USD) in 2026 and to $75.9 billion (USD) by 2034, exhibiting a Compound Annual Growth rate, or CAGR, of 11.12% during the forecast period, according to Fortune Business Insights (Report ID: FBI108868, Updated January, 2026).

tamClaims.claim: The total market for endocrine (thyroid) cancer assays is approximately $300 million annually.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate the total market for our endocrine (thyroid) cancer assays is approximately $300 million (USD) annually based on the current size of the patient population, estimated numbers of indeterminate biopsies and reimbursement rates.
